title: [architect] Implement thin `meta pr-repair` prototype commands
objective: Build: Implement the first thin `meta pr-repair` prototype over existing `rtk meta git worktree`, GitHub, and queue primitives, covering scan, classify, lane create, assign, watch, and merge-green with JSON output and dry-run support for mutating operations.
acceptance_criteria: `meta pr-repair scan --json` or the chosen thin-script equivalent emits open PR/check records with stable schema.
`classify OWNER/REPO#PR --json` emits the documented classification and evidence fields.
`lane create OWNER/REPO#PR --dry-run --json` renders the exact `rtk meta git worktree create` command without mutating state; non-dry-run creates a lane with metadata.
`watch --json` and `merge-green --dry-run --json` are implemented or explicitly stubbed with failing tests that document remaining work.
Prototype docs name the current command truth: `rtk meta git worktree`, not unavailable top-level aliases.
